external_locations.name: Sahara Noon (Extreme Sun)
external_locations.logic: Harsh top-down sun, heat haze (mirage), golden sand reflections, high contrast.
external_locations.atmosphere: Dust particles, clear blue sky, hard shadows.

external_locations.name: Nordic Frozen Tundra
external_locations.logic: Soft overcast light, snow-covered ground, ice crystals, cool blue tints.
external_locations.atmosphere: Breath mist, falling snowflakes, 5500K color temp.

external_locations.name: Amazon Rain Forest
external_locations.logic: Dappled sunlight through leaves (Gobo effect), high humidity, wet mossy surfaces.
external_locations.atmosphere: Volumetric sunbeams, tropical mist, deep green shadows.

external_locations.name: Urban Tokyo Night
external_locations.logic: Asphalt after rain, neon sign reflections, bokeh of city lights in background.
external_locations.atmosphere: Light smog, electric blue and hot pink hues.
